title: Better Weapon and Armour
description: Texture Pack by Ray Senpai/Aki Senpai 🌟
body:
Simple Designed Spear & Weapon Pack – Latest Minecraft Version

This texture pack introduces clean, simple, and well-designed spears that fit perfectly into the vanilla Minecraft style while still feeling fresh and modern. Every spear is carefully designed to look smooth, balanced, and easy on the eyes, making it great for both survival and PvP players.

🔹 Included Spears

Diamond Spear

Netherite Spear

Iron Spear

Stone Spear

Copper Spear

Gold Spear

Wooden Spear


Each spear follows a minimal and consistent design, so they feel natural in the game and do not look overdone. Whether you are exploring, fighting mobs, or showcasing your gear, these spears add a new level of style without breaking the Minecraft feel.

🔹 Future Updates

This pack is actively developed, and more content is planned:

New Weapons

Custom Armour


Future updates will expand the pack while keeping the same simple and clean design philosophy.

⭐ Credits

This project is MADE BY RAY SENPAI & AKI SENPAI, with full dedication and creativity. Their goal is to provide high-quality textures that are lightweight, stylish, and enjoyable for all players.

If you love simple weapon designs, smooth visuals, and future updates, this pack is perfect for you ⚔️
